title: Infinispan Remote Cache Store Configuration
description: Remote cache store configuration for Infinispan.

RemoteStore.description: Defines a remote cache store that connects to a Hot Rod server.

remote-cache-container.description: The name of the remote cache container to use.

socket-timeout.description: Enable/disable SO_TIMEOUT on socket connections to remote Hot Rod servers with the specified timeout, in milliseconds.

tcp-no-delay.description: Enable/disable TCP_NODELAY on socket connections to remote Hot Rod servers.

balancing-strategy.description: For replicated Hot Rod server clusters, the client balances requests to the servers according to this strategy.

connect-timeout.description: Defines the maximum socket connect timeout before giving up connecting to the server.

force-return-values.description: Whether or not to implicitly FORCE_RETURN_VALUE for all calls.

marshaller.description: Allows you to specify a custom Marshaller implementation to serialize and deserialize user objects.

protocol-version.description: Defines the protocol version that this client should use.

cache.description: The name of the remote cache in the remote Infinispan cluster, to which to connect to.

uri.description: URI for the remote cache that lets you configure connection strings with Hot Rod client properties.

remote-server.description: Defines remote Hot Rod server instances.

RemoteServer.description: Defines a remote Hot Rod server instance.

host.description: The hostname or IP address of the remote Hot Rod server.

port.description: The port of the remote Hot Rod server.

RemoteConnectionPool.description: Configuration of the connection pool for the remote store.

exhausted-action.description: Specifies what happens when asking for a connection from a server's pool, and that pool is exhausted.

max-active.description: Controls the maximum number of connections per server that are allocated at one time.

min-idle.description: Sets a target value for the minimum number of idle connections (per server) that should always be available.

max-pending-requests.description: Specifies maximum number of requests sent over single connection at one instant.

min-evictable-idle-time.description: Specifies the minimum amount of time that a connection may sit idle in the pool before it is eligible for eviction due to idle time.

username.description: The username to use when connecting.

password.description: The password to use when connecting.

username.description: The username to use when connecting.

password.description: The password to use when connecting.

realm.description: The realm to use when connecting.

protocol.description: The TLS/SSL protocol to use. Defaults to TLSv1.2.

sni-hostname.description: The SNI hostname to use when connecting.

filename.description: The path to the key store.

password.description: The password to use to access the key store.

key-alias.description: If the key store contains multiple keys, use the one with the specified alias.

filename.description: The path to the trust store.

password.description: The password to use to access the trust store.

name.description: The name of this remote cache container.

properties.description: Additional properties for remote cache container configuration.
